channel.title: Programming on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on My New Hugo Site

item.title: The Best Time to Learn
item.description: How AI can help you develop As the general gust of fear of AI replacing humans and their meaning spreads through the internet, this article why AI could in fact create more programmers quickly. https://terriblesoftware.org/2025/02/10/the-rise-of-the-junior-developer/
